locator.quote: The agent has no first-class £-target action; it has

text: The agent has no first-class £-target action; it must learn (stake, back_price, arb_ticks) → expected_£_profit from delayed cash signal alone.

locator.quote: In general, I'm looking to make a single £1

text: Operator: in general, I'm looking to make a single £1 of profit per trade — motivating a first-class £-target per open (target_pair_pnl £0.20–£5.00).

locator.quote: math + the agent's chosen stake, produces the target P&L on lock.

text: Session 01: the env solves for the lay-price that, given equal-profit sizing math and the agent's chosen stake, produces the target P&L on lock; an unsolvable/junk price refuses the open (the refusal is the signal).
